template.name: Enter the Gungeon（挺进地牢）
template.summary: 2D俯视Roguelike射击，密集弹幕，武器收集，高技巧上限独立精品。
analysis: Enter the Gungeon is used as a 2D indie reference for 2D top-down bullet-hell roguelike.
The template emphasizes dodge-roll timing, gun variety, room patterns, and comedic arsenal discovery across product, system, content, UX, presentation, balance, and service decisions.
All 39 concrete system/content nodes include schema-valid L5 entities; planning nodes carry game-specific design notes.
Based on public design analysis and genre-structure inference; this is not official game configuration data.

sources: Public product structure, store descriptions, visible gameplay systems, and genre design analysis.

template.qualityNote: 2D-only L5 redesign: all 39 concrete system/content nodes carry schema-valid entities; planning nodes have game-specific notes.
